title: OS-PM: Open-Source Reconstruction of the IAEA Physical Model
description: Apache-2.0 academic system that populates 88 in-scope element cells of the IAEA Physical Model from open-licensed data sources, with six analysis modules, four historical retrofit cases, and a reproducible test suite. Volume 11 (weaponization) is permanently excluded by scope policy.
notes: Volume 11 (Weaponization) is permanently excluded from this distribution by OS-PM scope policy. Detection-only academic research. See `pm_schema/V11_weaponization_excluded/_volume_overview.yaml` for the exclusion-policy stub.
